decision: Build workflow execution engine with persistent state

steps.action: Design schema and build CLI tool

steps.notes: Wired into session-start.sh — pending steps show in status line and context file

steps.action: Add workflow status to Chorus dashboard
steps.notes: Active workflows section added to /chorus page. Reads JSON manifests from messages/workflows/active/, renders cards with step progress, role colors, and card tags. Server-rendered, no JS.
Workflow pattern documented in team-architecture.md v1.3. Added Workflows subsection to Execution, updated artifact hierarchy (workflows, Clearing, Slack deprecation), changelog entry.
